tasks.subject: Task 1: Write fresh last_heartbeat in start_crawl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Close the 60-second blind window between start_crawl and first monitor-loop heartbeat tick.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py` (initial job_data dict)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py` (add TestReconciliationLeaderElection)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] job_data includes last_heartbeat=datetime.utcnow()
- [ ] source test passes
- [ ] no regression

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["last_heartbeat added", "source test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Remove is_local_job gate from stale-detection override
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Trust self.local_processes (not Redis replica_id) as the authoritative source of process ownership.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py` (local override in reconcile)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py` (add test_stale_override_does_not_require_is_local_job)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] is_local_job gate removed
- [ ] local_processes trusted
- [ ] source test passes

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestReconciliationLeaderElection -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestReconciliationLeaderElection -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["is_local_job removed", "local_processes trusted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add leader election to reconcile_jobs (helper-method pattern)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Only one replica runs reconciliation at a time. Rename reconcile_jobs to _reconcile_locked; add new thin reconcile_jobs wrapper with SET NX leader lock and ownership-safe release.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Public reconcile_jobs wraps with SET NX reconcile_leader_lock, TTL = RECONCILIATION_INTERVAL_SECONDS * 2
- [ ] Returns early when not leader
- [ ] Ownership-safe finally release
- [ ] _reconcile_locked contains original logic
- [ ] File parses
- [ ] 5 source tests pass

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["leader lock acquired", "early return", "ownership-safe release", "delegated to _reconcile_locked", "5 source tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Document reconciliation leader election in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the lock key, TTL formula, ownership-safe release, and complementary fixes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] new section added
- [ ] spec link included

**Verify:** `grep -q 'reconcile_leader_lock' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q 'reconcile_leader_lock' apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["documented", "spec link"]}
```
